title: rubus × subcarneus
intro: Rubus × subcarneus, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a plant species in the rose family that is a cross between the Himalayan blackberry and the thimbleberry. The medicinal properties of Rubus × subcarneus include its high content of antioxidants, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × subcarneus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, among others. Rubus × subcarneus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
